title: Troubleshoot equipment and/or production processes
competent_person_statement: A competent person in Troubleshoot equipment and/or production processes demonstrates consistent performance across all elements and performance criteria.

elements.title: Identify abnormal equipment and/or process performance

pcs.text: Determine whether testing equipment is operating to manufacturer specifications from available workplace information
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Determine whether testing equipment is operating to manufacturer specifications from available workplace information?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Determine whether testing equipment is operating to manufacturer specifications from available workplace information.

pcs.text: Recognise whether equipment outputs are consistent with normal operation
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Recognise whether equipment outputs are consistent with normal operation?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Recognise whether equipment outputs are consistent with normal operation.

pcs.text: Identify signs of equipment degradation and possible failure
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Identify signs of equipment degradation and possible failure?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Identify signs of equipment degradation and possible failure.

pcs.text: Inspect equipment outputs to determine nature of the problem
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Inspect equipment outputs to determine nature of the problem?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Inspect equipment outputs to determine nature of the problem.

pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Define nature of substandard performance?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Define nature of substandard performance.

elements.analysis_focus: Analyse evidence against Element E1: Identify abnormal equipment and/or process performance

elements.title: Identify causes of substandard performance

pcs.text: Select appropriate technical process for investigation
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Select appropriate technical process for investigation?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Select appropriate technical process for investigation.

pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Identify causes using fact-finding processes?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Identify causes using fact-finding processes.

pcs.text: Review maintenance records to ensure that system does not need simple maintenance
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Review maintenance records to ensure that system does not need simple maintenance?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Review maintenance records to ensure that system does not need simple maintenance.

pcs.text: Review calibration records to ensure system is within calibration
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Review calibration records to ensure system is within calibration?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Review calibration records to ensure system is within calibration.

pcs.text: Confirm that the appropriate test procedure, materials and equipment were used
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Confirm that the appropriate test procedure, materials and equipment were used?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Confirm that the appropriate test procedure, materials and equipment were used.

pcs.text: Conduct performance tests as appropriate to investigation
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Conduct performance tests as appropriate to investigation?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Conduct performance tests as appropriate to investigation.

pcs.text: Analyse equipment and/or testing variables to develop list of possible causes
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Analyse equipment and/or testing variables to develop list of possible causes?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Analyse equipment and/or testing variables to develop list of possible causes.

pcs.text: Isolate causes using appropriate elimination techniques
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Isolate causes using appropriate elimination techniques?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Isolate causes using appropriate elimination techniques.

elements.analysis_focus: Analyse evidence against Element E2: Identify causes of substandard performance

elements.title: Recommend corrective action

pcs.text: Propose and trial corrective action based on investigation
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Propose and trial corrective action based on investigation?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Propose and trial corrective action based on investigation.

pcs.text: Monitor trial data to ensure outputs are consistent with normal operation
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Monitor trial data to ensure outputs are consistent with normal operation?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Monitor trial data to ensure outputs are consistent with normal operation.

pcs.text: Review trial results to confirm validity of corrective action
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Review trial results to confirm validity of corrective action?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Review trial results to confirm validity of corrective action.

pcs.text: Maintain records in accordance with workplace procedures
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Maintain records in accordance with workplace procedures?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Maintain records in accordance with workplace procedures.

pcs.text: Submit report that summarises investigation and provides recommendations
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Submit report that summarises investigation and provides recommendations?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Submit report that summarises investigation and provides recommendations.
